title: ChatApp
description: A full-stack real-time chat application with user authentication, responsive design, and instant messaging features.

title: POS
description: A full-stack POS (Point of Sale) web app with authentication, order management, and Stripe payment integration.

title: E-Commerce
description: An AI-powered customer support chatbot built with Next.js, Tailwind CSS, Lucide React, and Redux Toolkit for state management.

title: Medical ChatBot
description: An AI-powered medical chatbot that uses LangChain, Pinecone, Flask, and OpenAI to answer medical-related questions using vector search and LLM responses.

title: Customer Support ChatBot
description: An AI-powered customer support chatbot built using LangChain and OpenAI that provides context-aware answers through retrieval-based search and LLM responses.

title: Docker QAP Deployment
description: A containerized application using Docker, demonstrating environment setup, dependency management, and application deployment through Docker containers.
